paras.text: Kuch din beet gaye. Baat thodi normal ho chuki thi, but {{A}} ko wo doori abhi bhi khatakti thi. Ek shaam, library band hone se pehle, dono akele reh gaye.

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: {{B}}, ek baat kahoon? Us din ke baad se lagta hai kuch badal gaya hai humare beech.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: (kitab band karte hue) Nahi aisi koi baat nahi... bas thoda time laga.

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: Sach kahoon, if I hadn't joined this project, I wouldn't know you so well now. Us project ne humein itna close kar diya.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: (muskurate hue, thodi narm hoke) Wah, naya grammar point bhi seekh liya emotional moment me! Ye hai na jab past ka ek kaam, abhi tak effect daal raha ho present me — 'Mixed Conditional' kehte hain isse.

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: Haan! Pehle wala 'if had' past ke liye, but doosra part 'would' — present ke liye, na ki 'would have'.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: Ekdum sahi pakda! Aur sach kahoon, mujhe bhi lagta hai — agar us din tumne mera naam na diya hota, hum itni gehri baat kabhi na kar paate jitni ab kar paate hain.

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: (halki si rahat ke saath muskurate hue) To sab theek hai humare beech?

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: Sab theek hai, pagal. Chalo ab ghar chalte hain, kal se phir naya topic — poora mixed practice.

quiz.q: Correct the error: 'If I had studied medicine, I would have been a doctor now.'
quiz.answer: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
quiz.explain: Mixed Conditional (past cause, present result) me main clause 'would + V1' hota hai kyunki result abhi present me hai, 'would have' nahi (jo poora past ke liye hota hai).

quiz.q: Fill (past action, present result): If she ___ (not/miss) that flight, she ___ (be) here with us today.
quiz.explain: 'If' clause past unreal (had + V3), main clause present result (would + V1) — classic Mixed Conditional structure.

quiz.q: Which is a Mixed Conditional — a) If I had left earlier, I would have caught the train. b) If I hadn't taken that job, I wouldn't be living here now.
quiz.answer: b) If I hadn't taken that job, I wouldn't be living here now.
quiz.explain: Option b) me past ka decision (taking the job) ka effect abhi present me dikh raha hai ('wouldn't be living now') — ye hi Mixed Conditional ki pehchaan hai. Option a) pura Type 3 hai (dono clause past).
